prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DRYSACK-PARENT Product Type: CARRIER_BAG_CASE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 15L 20L Waterproof Dry Sack Gusseted Bottom Ripstop Nylon Bag Description: Planning a camping, boating, or water sports trip this year? The ASR Outdoor waterproof dry sack is an ideal storage option for your essentials while doing outdoor activities like camping, hiking, and kayaking. This bag has a capacity of either 15 or 20 liters so you can count on it to protect your gear from inclement weather and water.

Our dry sack is made of durable, ripstop 70D PU-coated nylon inside and out designed to protect your essentials.

The bag features a large gusseted bottom allowing you to store even more gear. The extra pieces of fabric give the bag added strength and room: the 15L sealed size is 14" x 20.5" with a gusset size of 6.5" x 9.75". The 20L sealed size is 14.25" x 25.5" with a gusset size is 6.5" x 9.75".

Each bag also comes with a strong buckle closure to ensure that your items are secured even during intense travel and movement. It features a D-ring ideal for attaching items you may need quick access to like keys, straps, compasses, whistles and other camping accessories. Make sure to grab one of these versatile waterproof bags before your next outdoor adventure. Search Terms: waterproof bag waterproof beach bag waterproof dry bag sea to summit dry bag travel bag ripstop nylon boating accessories waterproof bags for boating camping accessories camping gear camping essentials kayaking equipment dry bags Features: - LARGE CAPACITY DRY BAG - ASR Outdoor waterproof dry sack holds up to 15 or 20 liters of personal items; Ideal waterproof storage bag for outdoor activities where essentials may be exposed to moisture and water like boating, kayaking, and camping - WATERPROOF MATERIAL - Dry sack is made of durable, Ripstop 70D PU-coated nylon inside and out designed to protect your essentials from water - GUSSETED BOTTOM - Bag features large gusseted bottom allowing you to store more gear; Extra pieces of fabric give the bag extra strength and room; Sealed size: 14" x 20.5"/14.25" x 25.5"; Gusset size: 6.5" x 9.75" - SAFE AND SECURE - Strong buckle closure ensures items are secured even during intense travel and movement; Comes with D-ring ideal for attaching items for quick access like whistles, keys, straps, and compasses - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: Ripstop 70D nylon; Inside: PU coated nylon; Color: Green or Grey; Capacity: 15L or 20L; Sealed size: 14" x 20.5"/14.25" x 25.5"; Gusset size: 6.5" x 9.75"; Closure type: buckle with D-ring === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 15L 20L Waterproof Dry Sack Ripstop Nylon

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 15L 20L Waterproof Dry Sack Ripstop Nylon Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: Gusseted Bottom, PU-Coated Nylon, Buckle Closure, D-Ring, Camping, Kayaking, Boating

openai.title_differentiation: 70D PU-Coated Ripstop Nylon, Gusseted Bottom, Buckle Closure, D-Ring Attachment, Lightweight Storage
